userPromptSubmitted.comment: Validate prompts against Akto Guardrails (monitoring only - cannot block per GitHub limitation)

preToolUse.comment: Validate and block tool execution based on Akto Guardrails policies

postToolUse.comment: Ingest tool execution results to Akto for monitoring and analytics

_disabled_SessionStart.comment: DISABLED: not supported by current GitHub Copilot hook contract. To re-enable, rename key back to 'SessionStart' and ship akto-hook-wrapper.{sh,ps1} + akto-hooks.py.

_disabled_Stop.comment: DISABLED: not supported by current GitHub Copilot hook contract. To re-enable, rename key back to 'Stop' and ship akto-hook-wrapper.{sh,ps1} + akto-hooks.py.
